constraints: Maintain strict continuity with framework_skeleton.json and arc_tracker.json.
Ensure Chapter 1 ('Smoke Test Chapter') demonstrates progression through all gates.
Adhere to the 'clear and grounded' tone without excessive jargon.
Respect the 450-word target for this specific chapter section.
Verify agent health status (idle/healthy) before proceeding to next generation.
Log all state changes to run_journal.jsonl and update progress_index.json.
acceptance_criteria: Output must be a valid JSON object containing all required keys.
Chapter 1 text must explicitly describe the system verifying the orchestration pipeline under stress.
The generated content must align with the current arc state in arc_tracker.json.
No placeholders or vague descriptions; all narrative elements must be concrete.
Resource utilization must remain within normal mode limits (pressure_mode.active: false).
Handoff directory must be updated with the completed chapter payload.
Next step for downstream agent: Generate Chapter 2 'Load Test' based on resolved gates from Chapter 1.
